title: Galicia · Pontevedra rúa Sarmiento · drizzle
editorial_argument: the Atlantic eats slowly · but it eats
emotional_thesis: an observation, not a claim · the walk is the work · we are not here to feel anything in particular · we are here to be there
atmospheric_thesis: one weather state held across four shots · rain dampening sound · slate stone darkening uniformly · puddles forming · iron balcony bleeding rust into granite
perceptual_thesis: the room of the street · cobbles wet · arcaded · medieval bones under early 20th-century skins · the smell of the Atlantic is in the wall · we cannot see the sea but we hear it twice
pacing_thesis: four shots · 16 seconds total · 30% silence share · the pacing of someone who has decided to stand still until it stops raining
memory_thesis: the afterimage the listener carries away should not be the place · it should be a single specific detail · the drainpipe pulse · the iron balcony streak · the steamed café window
acoustic_thesis: rain on slate as the dominant signal · drainpipe pulse as the rhythm · distant church bell at t≈10s as the only intentional event · room tone of rain_diffusion at -38dBFS continuous · never silent · never musical
human_presence_thesis: indirect humanity only · silhouette crossing rain in shot 2 · steamed café window in shot 4 · no face · no symbolic posing · no actors · just the city continuing to be itself in the rain
silence_thesis: silence here is not the absence of sound · silence here is the rain · the ambient signal level is high but the *event* density is low · this is rain_silence in the strict P31.4 sense
justification_for_first: AXÓN must learn to be present before it is allowed to mourn. Galicia drizzle is the smallest correct first capsule: weather is what current providers do best, the editorial argument can be true without being heavy, the human presence is structurally indirect, the acoustic richness is high, the budget is the lowest of the five legends ($3.00), and the constitutional layer's scrutiny is at its baseline (not_sacred). Pass here, and we have earned the right to attempt Hiroshima next.
